pi_items.verified_value: Commercial Property Management (NAICS 531312 - Nonresidential Property Managers)
pi_items.source: https://www.census.gov/naics - North American Industry Classification System; task uses OpenMAINT, a real CMMS for facility/property management

task.json description and setup_task.sh lines 117-133 define expected_new_codes array: ['WO-STORM-001', 'WO-STORM-002', 'WO-STORM-003']; verifier.py C1 criterion (lines 81-85) checks for 3 new work orders
task.json description and setup_task.sh lines 63-72 create pre-existing work order 'WO-PRE-RESOLVED' for agent to close; verifier.py C4 criterion (lines 121-131) checks for 1 closure

task.json description and setup_task.sh lines 75-84 create contamination work order 'WO-CONTAM-001' that must not be modified; verifier.py C5 criterion (lines 134-146) checks preservation of this single work order

privileged_info_summary: Regional Maintenance Director task in OpenMAINT facility management system. Task requires agent to create 3 new storm-related corrective maintenance work orders (WO-STORM-001, WO-STORM-002, WO-STORM-003) for Buildings 1-3 with critical/high/medium priorities respectively, close 1 pre-resolved work order (WO-PRE-RESOLVED), and preserve 1 unrelated contamination work order (WO-CONTAM-001) unchanged. Occupation classified as Maintenance and Repair Workers, General (SOC 49-9071.00) in Commercial Property Management industry (NAICS 531312). All data created synthetically for task environment via OpenMAINT Docker deployment and setup scripts.
